---
applyTo: "**/*.md, **/*.html"
---

# SEO Rules — PetTransportGlobal

## Page-Level Requirements (Every Page)
- Unique title tag per page. No two pages share the same title.
- Title length: 50-60 characters
- Route title formula: "Pet Transport [Origin] to [Destination] | [Brand]" — rotate alternates across routes
- Meta description: 140-160 characters. Includes a reassurance hook and CTA.
- Exactly one H1 per page, containing the primary keyword
- Primary keyword must appear in: title, H1, first 100 words, at least one H2, meta description

## Schema Markup
- FAQ schema (FAQPage JSON-LD) required on all route, country, airline, and breed pages
- Service schema on lead-generation pages
- HowTo schema on process/guide pages where applicable

## Internal Linking
- Route pages must link to: origin country hub + destination country guide + at least 2 relevant airline pages
- Country guides link to: all routes originating from or destined for that country
- Airline pages link to: relevant route pages where that airline operates
- Breed pages link to: relevant country pages with breed bans, and relevant airline pages with breed restrictions
- Minimum 2 internal links per new page, descriptive anchor text only (never "click here")

## Content SEO
- Route pages target: "pet transport [A] to [B]", "ship dog from [A] to [B]", "pet relocation [A] to [B]"
- Country pages target: "pet import rules [country]", "bringing pets to [country]", "pet export from [country]"
- Airline pages target: "[airline name] pet policy", "[airline] pet cargo", "fly [airline] with dog"
- Breed pages target: "[breed] international travel", "[breed] banned countries", "[breed] airline restrictions"

## E-E-A-T Signals
- Author attribution on all content pages
- Named, dated official sources for every regulatory claim
- Trust signals: IATA compliance references, government source citations
- No unverified statistics or fabricated data
